Infectum.turoyo: iḏa kān k-səmḥat, d-obat-li ṭaṣe d-maye m-i=dguštayḏax
translations:
wenn
			du erlaubst, gibst du mir eine Schale Wasser aus deinem Krug

Infectum.turoyo: k-obaʕno d-aloho msamaḥ-li, w-ono gəd-howéno-le greʕo hul l-u=mawto uʕdo ʕféli-lux w-k-obaʕno d-msamḥat-li b-i=ġalṭ-aṯi diḏiono k-msamaḥn-ux, bas gabux lə=k-foyašnogəd-oṯeno uʕdo l-gabux d-msamḥina ḥḏoḏeomər ya malk-ayḏi k-obaʕno mede minux gə-msamḥət-li ebe
translations:
I
			want God to forgive me and I will become [His] servant till the
			very death

‘Now, I have forgiven you and I want you to pardon me for my
			fault’; 36/138;
‘I forgive you, but I will not stay with you anymore’; 36/143;
‘Now I come to you that we may pardon each other’; 42/10;

‘My king, I want something from you. Will you grant it to me?’
			84/46;
